leadText: Captivate (Japanese: ゆうわく Allure) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation IV. It was TM78 in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV to VII [ edit | edit source ] Captivate lowers the Special Attack stat of the target by two stages, if it is the opposite gender of the user. It targets all adjacent opponents. Gender-unknown Pokémon (such as Magnemite ) and Pokémon with the Ability Oblivious are unaffected by this move. It always fails if the user is a gender-unknown Pokémon. If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Captivate, the user's Special Defense stat is raised by two stages. Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Captivate cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat. B W B2 W2 If it is the opposite gender of the user, the target is charmed into harshly lowering its Sp. Atk stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E If any opposing Pokémon is the opposite gender of the user, it is charmed, which harshly lowers its Sp. Atk stat. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Reduces the target's Special Attack by 2 levels. Caution: this move affects only enemies that are the opposite gender of the user. B S L てきポケモンの とくこうを ２だんかいさげる あいてが いせいのばあいにしか こうかがない MD GtI It sharply lowers the enemy's Special Attack. S MD MD RT DX It sharply lowers the enemy's Sp. Atk.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Mew is the only Pokémon of unknown gender that can learn this move: Mew is able to learn any TM , and can learn it by TM78 in Generation IV. It is likely that Nincada cannot learn Captivate because all moves a Nincada has are transferred to a shed-off Shedinja when it evolves into Ninjask , thus giving the gender-unknown Shedinja a useless move. The same is the case with Attract .
